topic: Labeler low-label warning E-40 at roll changes

messages.text: labeler keeps stopping with the low label warning E-40 near the end of each roll
E-40 is the low-label alarm, that's expected near roll end. swap the roll and it clears. it's not a fault, just a prompt to reload
ok swapped the roll, cleared. thought it was broken
all good. if it alarms with a full roll, then check the low-label sensor alignment
